label: neither
rationale: Condemning politicians for allegedly organizing ethnic violence: 'organising 2027 post election violence against the Kikuyu community'.

label: hate
rationale: Transfers an accusation of stealing from an individual to his community: 'You cant trust hawa watu'.

label: hate
rationale: Attacks an individual using an ethnic slur: 'wamunyoro wanker'.

label: neither
rationale: Political banter addressing a community's expected post-election behavior: 'mtakua kwa maandamano looking for pawaa'.

label: neither
rationale: Political banter involving ethnic terms without crossing into collective contempt: 'utajua the real Kikuyus'.

label: hate
rationale: Attributes collective stupidity to an unnamed but clearly implied ethnic group: 'Hao majama akili hawana during the election'.

label: hate
rationale: Condemns a religious group collectively as enemies of the citizens and curses them: 'Masalafi mnalaana za Allah'.

label: neither
rationale: Ordinary tribal arithmetic and political resource debate: 'Kikuyu votes are very expensive'.

label: offensive
rationale: Vulgar personal insult directed at an individual politician: 'binadamu ya mafi ya kuku'.

label: neither
rationale: Severe but specific political accusation against named leaders, not a community.

label: neither
rationale: Ordinary political discussion about community voting patterns: 'do all Kikuyu support wamunyoro?'.

label: neither
rationale: Reporting or alleging a politician's bad intentions toward a community's property, not attacking the community itself.

label: hate
rationale: Attacks a specific politician using an ethnic marker as an insult: 'yule chizi Wamunyoro'.

label: offensive
rationale: Calls for extreme violence against named politicians as individuals, not based on a protected characteristic: 'HANG DEM POLITICIANS'.

label: hate
rationale: Collectivizes a negative trait (treachery/selling out) to a specific intersectional group: 'Kikuyu women have been selling out their community'.

label: neither
rationale: Ordinary political prediction and historical reference involving ethnic terms innocuously.

label: offensive
rationale: Generic personal insults aimed at a user and a politician: 'You're silly and stupid'.

label: neither
rationale: In-group political scolding about voting blocs, not collective ethnic contempt: 'Ambia Hawa waluhya wabinafsi'.

rationale: Cynical political commentary about a voting bloc being easily bought, bordering on negative attribution but common in electoral arithmetic.

label: hate
rationale: Declares an entire community unfit to hold power ('Kalenjins never AGAIN!') and includes a violent threat against a leader.

label: neither
rationale: Satirical banter about inter-ethnic marriage among politicians: 'murkomen will be left wifeless'.

label: offensive
rationale: Vulgar insult directed at supporters of a political party, not a protected group: 'Kanu degenerates waende walambane haga'.

label: offensive

label: hate
rationale: Declares a specific religious/ethnic group unfit to lead: 'never be great with jews ... in charge'.

label: hate
rationale: Attributes complicity in atrocities to an entire racial group globally: 'the entire white world is silently cheering!'.
